parameters.content: wf_tenant_row_policy_upsert writes a tenant row policy to /tenants/row-policy so stricter row-level tenant isolation can be staged per core table without editing code.

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{tenant_id:'default', resource_table:'jobs', strict_mode:'enforce', require_tenant_match:true, allow_admin_override:true, allow_service_account_override:false, allow_global_rows:false, metadata_json:{owner:'platform', note:'Enforce tenant match for job rows before enabling strict row isolation globally'}}}];

const body = $json.body || $json; const policy = body.policy || {}; return [{json:{status: body.status || 'ok', tenant_id: policy.tenant_id || 'default', resource_table: policy.resource_table, strict_mode: policy.strict_mode, require_tenant_match: !!policy.require_tenant_match, allow_admin_override: !!policy.allow_admin_override, allow_service_account_override: !!policy.allow_service_account_override, allow_global_rows: !!policy.allow_global_rows, metadata_json: policy.metadata_json || {}, source: policy.source || 'unknown'}}];
